definition: condition of use prescribed for evaluating the performance of a measuring system or for comparison of measurement results

definition_ml.en: condition of use prescribed for evaluating the performance of a measuring system or for comparison of measurement results
definition_ml.fr: condition dans laquelle les performances d'un appareil sont soumises à essai
definition_ml.de: Nutzungsbedingung, die für die Bewertung der Leistung eines Messsystems oder für den Vergleich von Messergebnissen heranzuziehen ist

source_document: ISO/IEC Guide 99:2007, 4.11, modified – "measuring instrument" removed from definition
note:
Note 1 to entry: Reference operating conditions specify intervals of values of the measurand and of the influence quantities.
Note 2 to entry: In IEC 60050-300, International Electrotechnical Vocabulary – Electrical and electronic measurements and measuring instruments, definition 311-06-02, the term "reference condition" refers to an operating condition under which the specified instrumental measurement uncertainty is the smallest possible.

note_ml.en:
Note 1 to entry: Reference operating conditions specify intervals of values of the measurand and of the influence quantities.
Note 2 to entry: In IEC 60050-300, International Electrotechnical Vocabulary – Electrical and electronic measurements and measuring instruments, definition 311-06-02, the term "reference condition" refers to an operating condition under which the specified instrumental measurement uncertainty is the smallest possible.
